---
title: "EDLD_650_DARE_03"
author: "Dodjivi Amekoudji & Michelle Cui"
format: pdf
editor: visual
fig-width: 7
fig-height: 4
execute: 
  eval: true 
  message: false 
  warning: false
---

## EDLD 650: Data Analysis and Replication Exercise

## DARE 03

```{r include =FALSE}
library(pacman)

# These are the packages you will need for the analyses 
p_load(here, tidyverse, DT, ggplot2, xaringan, knitr, kableExtra, modelsummary, stargazer, xaringanthemer, gganimate, ggthemes, fixest, haven, quantreg,rdrobust, patchwork)
```

```{r}
# Loading data

df <- read_csv(here("data/EDLD_650_DARE_3.csv"))

```

#### A. Baseline randomization checks




#### B. Replication and Extension
